output.content: {"posts":[{"id":"DAY3-034","author":"SarahJ_WellnessAdvocate","text":"Please stop sharing posts like this! @PureBalanceMethod is telling people to ditch their chemo and radiotherapy for a 7-day lemon juice detox.
